name: Jiangsu Nhwa Pharmaceutical Co., LTD
summary: Jiangsu Nhwa Pharmaceutical Co., LTD produces and sells central nervous system drugs in China and internationally. It offers drugs in the anesthesia, psychiatry, and neurological categories. The company also provides APIs in the areas of central nervous system, anesthetic and sedative, anti-fungal, and others. In addition, it is developing various cardiovascular products, such as Iptakalim, an anti-hypertension drug. The company has a collaborative research agreement with the Ann Romney Center for Neurologic Diseases at Brigham, and Women's Hospital and Biodextris to develop a novel immuno-stimulatory therapy for neurologic disorders. Jiangsu Nhwa Pharmaceutical Co., LTD was founded in 1978 and is based in Xuzhou, China.
